title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 3–5, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Chopper, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There isn't even a square inch for you to stand on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm in a hurry, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How was he able to cut someone who's immortal?! This could be critical information!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I understand you did all you can, that's enough!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for over there, I'll deal with that.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
